What We Do

Full-Service Roofing Solutions

From minor repairs to complete roof replacements, we handle every roofing need for residential and commercial properties across DFW.

🔧

Roof Repairs

Fast, reliable repairs for leaks, damaged shingles, flashing issues, and more. We fix it right the first time.

🏠

Complete roof replacement with quality materials and expert installation. Built to last for decades.

Expert roofing for new construction projects. We work with builders and contractors across the Metroplex.

🌧️

Gutters

Gutter installation, repair, and cleaning to protect your home from water damage year-round.

⛈️

Storm Damage

Rapid response for hail and wind damage. We assess, document, and restore your roof quickly.

🏢

Commercial Roofing

Flat roofs, TPO, EPDM, and more for commercial properties. Minimal disruption to your business.

🏡

Residential Roofing

Full-service residential roofing with premium materials and craftsmanship that adds value to your home.

📋

Insurance Claims

We work directly with your insurance company to make the claims process stress-free and straightforward.

Storm Damage Education

Can You Spot Hail Damage?

Most homeowners can't — and that's exactly why they lose thousands of dollars in unclaimed insurance money every year. Hail damage is often invisible to the untrained eye, but left undetected it leads to leaks, structural damage, and denied insurance claims. At American Roof Master, our HAAG Certified inspectors are among the best in the business at identifying hail damage — even when nobody else can see it. Don't wait until it's too late.

Get a FREE Hail Inspection →
✅

No Hail Damage

Healthy shingles — what a good roof looks like

✅ NO HAIL DAMAGE
Normal granule texture — uniform and intact
✅ NO HAIL DAMAGE
Clean shingle surface with no impact marks
✅ NO HAIL DAMAGE
Consistent color and texture throughout
VS
⛈️

Hail Damage Detected

What our HAAG inspectors find that others miss

⛈️ HAIL DAMAGE
Impact bruising and granule loss visible across shingles
⛈️ HAIL DAMAGE
Direct puncture through shingle — immediate replacement needed
⛈️ HAIL DAMAGE
Dark bruising indicates granule displacement from hail impact
⛈️ HAIL DAMAGE
HAAG certified inspection — each impact point marked and documented for insurance claim

Not Sure If Your Roof Has Hail Damage?

Most damage is invisible without a trained eye. Our HAAG Certified inspectors will give you a FREE comprehensive inspection and handle your insurance claim from start to finish.

About Us

About American Roof Master

American Roof Master LLC has been proudly serving the Dallas–Fort Worth Metroplex since 2011. We are a fully licensed and insured roofing company committed to delivering exceptional quality on every project — residential or commercial.

From minor repairs to full roof replacements, storm damage, gutters, and insurance claims — we handle it all with professionalism, integrity, and attention to detail. Every job is completed to the highest standard, and we don't consider it done until you're completely satisfied.

  • Fully licensed and insured in Texas
  • Free estimates on all projects
  • We handle insurance claims for you
  • No deposit required — pay after work is complete
  • Residential & commercial expertise
  • Serving all of DFW Metroplex
